description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front face features three horizontal drawers with subtle, integrated handles and a series of fine horizontal grooves, adding texture and visual interest. The top and sides are smooth, showcasing a rich, natural wood grain pattern. The back is plain with several cutouts, likely for cable management, suggesting it could serve as a media console. The cabinet sits directly on the ground with a recessed base, giving it a floating appearance. Its construction appears sturdy, suitable for supporting electronics or decorative items in an urban living space or office.
description: A modern, low-profile wooden cabinet with three grooved drawers and a smooth wood grain finish, ideal for media or storage use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three grooved drawers with integrated handles and a textured facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's smooth, uninterrupted wood grain and rectangular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing plain wood with several rectangular cutouts, likely for cable management.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a smooth wood finish and no visible features.
